title: Effusiella pellifeloides
taxonomy: Effusiella pellifeloides is classified within the division Ascomycota, which comprises a large group of fungi characterized by the production of ascospores. It belongs to the class Dothideomycetes, an order of fungi that are primarily saprotrophic and parasitic. Further classification places Effusiella pellifeloides within the family Effusiellaceae, a family of fungi that are mostly lichenicolous, meaning they grow on lichens. The genus Effusiella is a small group of fungi that are largely undescribed and require further research. This classification is subject to change as new research and discoveries become available.
